CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2025 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-08-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel General Motors Llcs Further Response To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Requests Nos. 2-15, 18-20, 22, & 24-29
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Elliot Conn, Esq. 415-417-2780 Conn Law for Plaintiff.
Cameron Major, Esq. 949-777-6032 Erskine Law Group for Defendant.

ARGUED. Mr. Major requests more time - 30 days. Mr. Conn objects. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling and modifies due date of sanctions to 3/10/25.

PLAINTIFF ROSANNA SHATARA's Motion To Compel General Motors Llcs Further Response To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Requests Nos. 2-15, 18-20, 22, & 24-29.

Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to Request For Production of Documents, Request Nos. 2-15, 18-20, 22, & 24-29 is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2024 Set For Trial On May-27-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
